title: Frontend doesn't allow task or function parameter declarations in parentheses

features.name: task with inline input parameter declaration
features.description: Code should include a task declaration with input parameter declared in the task header parentheses (ANSI-style), not in the task body

features.name: function with inline input parameter declaration
features.description: Code should include a function declaration with input parameter declared in the function header parentheses (ANSI-style), not in the function body
